ideation: This animation sequence depicts a somber, perhaps mournful, lowering of a flag.  The robot will begin with both arms raised, holding the flag high, then slowly lower it. The movement should be deliberate and slow, reflecting the gravity of the situation.  The final frame will show the flag held low, near the ground.  The neutral left arm will provide contrast and maintain balance. I will use the examples of waving and the thumbs up to guide the slow, deliberate movements. The flag is held by both arms.

frames.beat: both arms raise the flag high, held with pride
slowly, deliberately, the flag is lowered together
the flag droops low, a moment of quiet respect
